findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 49. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Figure 1 bar chart ('Total Number of Survey Sites - By Year') is missing as an image. The chart's axis labels and data values are rendered as plain text instead of preserving the chart graphic.
findings.evidence: PDF page 10 shows a bar chart with bars for each year 2012-2023 and labeled data values. The HTML renders only extracted text: 'Total Number of Survey Sites - By Year', 'Number of Survey Sites', '2012 2013 2014...', '5775 6564 5378...' etc., with no chart image.

findings.description: Figure 2 bar chart ('Lake Gaston Aquatic Plant Community - 2023') is missing as an image. The chart's axis labels and species names are rendered as plain text instead of preserving the chart graphic.
findings.evidence: PDF page 10 shows a grouped bar chart categorized by Emergent, Submergent, Floating, and Algae species. The HTML renders only extracted text: 'Lake Gaston Aquatic Plant Community - 2023', '% Total Vegetation', species names listed as plain text, with no chart image.

findings.description: Figure 7 dual-axis chart ('Lake Gaston Hydrilla') showing estimated standing acreage (bars) and percent occurrence (line) is missing as an image. Only axis labels and scale values appear as plain text.
findings.evidence: PDF page 15 shows a combined bar-and-line chart for hydrilla acreage and rake toss percentage from 2012-2023. The HTML renders only: 'Lake Gaston Hydrilla', 'Acres Rake Tosses', 'Acres Percent of Rake Tosses', '0 200 400 600...', '0 10 20 30...', '2012 2013...' as plain text, with no chart image.

findings.description: Figure 9 dual-axis chart ('Lake Gaston Lyngbya') showing estimated standing acreage and percent occurrence is missing as an image. Only axis labels and scale values appear as plain text.
findings.evidence: PDF page 17 shows a combined bar-and-line chart for lyngbya acreage and rake toss percentage from 2012-2023. The HTML renders only: 'Lake Gaston Lyngbya', 'Acres Percent of Rake Tosses', 'Acres', '0 200 400 600...', '0 5 10 15 20 25', '2012 2013...' as plain text, with no chart image.

findings.description: Figure 11 chart ('Lake Gaston Eel Grass') showing estimated standing acreage and percent occurrence is missing as an image. Only axis labels and scale values appear as plain text.
findings.evidence: PDF page 19 shows a bar chart with line overlay for eel grass acreage and percent survey sites from 2019-2023. The HTML renders only: 'Lake Gaston Eel Grass', 'Acres Percent Survey Sites', 'Acres % Sites', '0 20 40 60 80 100 120 140', '0.0 0.5 1.0...', '2019 2020...' as plain text, with no chart image.

findings.description: Table 2 loses italic formatting that distinguishes sites where hydrilla populations have fallen below detectable levels. The table description references italicized results, but no italic text appears in the HTML table, making the referenced formatting distinction meaningless.
findings.evidence: PDF Table 2 uses italic text across entire rows for sites like Timberline Shores, Cold Springs Branch, Lakeview, Pretty Creek, Poe Creek, Woodland Hurst, Sledge Creek, and Flats (including their Starting Bank Density and n/a values). The HTML table renders all values in regular text. The accompanying note 'Results for the 2023 survey season that are represented in italics indicate sites in which the hydrilla population has fallen below detectable levels' still appears but has no corresponding italic formatting to reference.

findings.description: Five chart/graph figures (Figures 1, 2, 7, 9, and 11) from the PDF are missing as tags in the HTML. Their data is rendered as unstructured text paragraphs instead of chart images, losing the visual representation of trends over time.
findings.evidence:
PDF pages 10, 15, 17, and 19 contain bar/line charts for: Figure 1 (Total Number of Survey Sites by Year), Figure 2 (Aquatic Plant Community 2023), Figure 7 (Lake Gaston Hydrilla acreage/rake tosses), Figure 9 (Lake Gaston Lyngbya acreage/rake tosses), and Figure 11 (Lake Gaston Eel Grass acreage/% sites). In the HTML, these are rendered as raw text paragraphs like '

Total Number of Survey Sites - By Year

5775 6564 5378…

' with no corresponding tags.

findings.description: Tables 1 and 2 each appear twice in the HTML — once as an embedded page-width image and once as a full HTML <table> — resulting in content duplication.
findings.evidence: For Table 1, the HTML contains both '' immediately followed by a complete '' with all the same data rows. The same pattern is repeated for Table 2. These full-page-width images (612pt ≈ 8.5in) are screenshots of the PDF table pages and duplicate the HTML table content.
